revision.comment: Auto-generated page using script written by Immanuelle, either as a placeholder redirect or to make bots recognize the page as made by Immanuelle
revision.text: [[Category:New uncategorized original categories]]

revision.comment: Moving [[:Category:Categories by psychoactive drug]] to [[:Category:Individual psychoactive drugs]] per [[Wikipedia:Categories for discussion/Log/2020 January 25#Category:Categories by psychoactive drug]]
revision.text:
{{Commons category|Alcohol}} :''This [[Wikipedia:Category|category]] is about the consumption of '''[[Alcoholic drink]]s''' by humans.'' :''For articles on specific brands of alcoholic drinks, see [[:Category:Alcoholic drinks]]'' :''For articles on beer, wine, and cider, see [[:Category:Fermented drinks]]''
[[Category:Ethanol]] [[Category:Individual psychoactive drugs]]

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: Mass importing wikipedia categories, not taking histories because these are unused ones and it is kind of obvious where they came from
revision.text:

[[Category:Ethanol]] [[Category:Individual psychoactive drugs]]

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Refreshing redirects
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page & cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Uncategorized categories
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "[[:en:Category|Category]]" to ""
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Text replacement - "==Old Content==↵==" to "=="
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q8234322)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "{{draft categories|↵}}" to ""
revision.text:
==Old Content== {{Commons category|Alcohol}} :''This is about the consumption of '''[[:en:Alcoholic drink|Alcoholic drink]]s''' by humans.'' :''For articles on specific brands of alcoholic drinks, see [[:Category:Alcoholic drinks]]'' :''For articles on beer, wine, and cider, see [[:Category:Fermented drinks]]''
==Categories==
[[en:Alcohol]] [[en:Category:Alcohol]] [[Wikipedia:Category|category]] {{wikidata link|Q8234322}} [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Original categories]]

==Old Content== {{Commons category|Alcohol}} :''This is about the consumption of '''[[:en:Alcoholic drink|Alcoholic drink]]s''' by humans.'' :''For articles on specific brands of alcoholic drinks, see [[:Category:Alcoholic drinks]]'' :''For articles on beer, wine, and cider, see [[:Category:Fermented drinks]]''
